top_signals.title: RBI May Have Sold Gold to Save Foreign Reserves, BE Report Shows
top_signals.summary: India’s central bank may have offloaded a portion of its gold holdings to shield its foreign-currency assets from the cascading fallout of the war in the Middle East, according to an analysis by Bloomberg Economics based on publicly available data.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Powell, Acceptance Remarks
top_signals.summary: Speech For the 2026 John F. Kennedy Profile in Courage Award, John F. Kennedy Library Foundation, Boston, Massachusetts
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Mt. Gox moves 10,422 bitcoin worth $739 million to a new wallet as deadline nears
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Critical Windows Netlogon RCE flaw now exploited in attacks
top_signals.summary: The Centre for Cybersecurity Belgium (CCB), the country's national authority for cybersecurity, warned on Friday that threat actors are now exploiting a recently patched critical Windows Netlogon vulnerability in attacks. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Removal of nuclear fuel from Fukushima plant reactor pool begins
top_signals.summary: Radiation levels at the No. 2 reactor building are still high after the nuclear fuel in the reactor melted down in the March 2011 accident.

top_signals.title: TON revives Gram token brand as Telegram CEO Durov says network is ‘returning to roots’
top_signals.summary: The Gram rebrand follows network upgrades, fee cuts, and Telegram's push for a larger role in TON governance.

top_signals.title: NSA selects new leads for key cybersecurity posts
top_signals.summary: David Imbordino, an NSA senior executive who most recently led its cybersecurity directorate in an acting capacity, has been named as its new chief. Bruce Jones, a career NSA technical and operational leader, as the new head of its Cybersecurity Collaboration Center.
